title: Amtech S1895 Flexible Drain Auger & Waste Pipe Unblocker
features: ROBUST AND FLEXIBLE: This flexible 500mm (120") drain and waste pipe unblocker has a robust coiled steel construction with cranked handle and pigtail end for effective unblocking
FOR PLASTIC WASTE PIPES: It is designed for unblocking standard plastic 32mm (1.25") and 40mm (1.5") waste pipes used on washing machines, dishwashers and showers
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your plumbing requirements. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Amtech Drain & Waste Pipe Unblocker The Amtech Drainpipe Unblocker can tackle a wide array of blockages including; grease, tissue papers, cocktail, food scraps, hair, and other substances. Suitable for 32 & 40mm waste pipes on sinks, baths, drains, dishwashers, and washing machines. To clear blockage easily, the pipe unblocker is made from robust coiled steel, and comes with a pigtail end and cranked handle. Thanks to its 5-metre length, you can reach blockages in even the inaccessible areas. Flexible steel spring wire Plastic handle Pig tail end 5-metre-long for improved access Cranked handle for improved blockage clearance
